description_long: This is a rugged, urban-style axe featuring a broad, asymmetrical metal blade with a distinctive etched or engraved pattern on one side. The blade appears weathered and slightly chipped, suggesting heavy use or intentional distressing for aesthetic effect. The handle is made of wood, partially wrapped with a dark, textured grip material, likely leather or synthetic, for enhanced handling and comfort. The lower end of the handle is further reinforced with additional wrapping and a hanging strap, adding to its utilitarian look. The axe head is secured to the handle with visible metal fastenings, and the poll (rear) of the axe head is squared and robust, possibly for hammering. This tool combines both functional and decorative elements, making it suitable for display or practical use in an urban environment.
description: A rugged, urban axe with a broad, engraved metal blade and a wood handle wrapped in dark grip material, featuring a reinforced end and hanging strap.
description_view_0: The axe is shown with its engraved blade facing forward, highlighting the decorative pattern and the robust, squared poll at the rear.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed edge-on, showing the thickness of the blade and the layered construction of the handle grip.
description_view_2: The plain side of the blade is visible, displaying its weathered surface and the full curvature of the cutting edge.
description_view_3: The rear of the axe is shown, emphasizing the poll and the attachment hardware securing the blade to the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a round cross-section, partially wrapped in dark, textured grip material and reinforced at the lower end with a hanging strap.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, asymmetrical steel blade with a single cutting edge, decorative engraved pattern on one side, squared poll, and visible wear or chipping.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged and pinned mounting with visible metal fastenings securing the blade to the handle.
